run_v1.diagnosis: The reference and H0 scope caps made at least four target flips infeasible, and free-form operator params allowed feature names to be silently ignored.

run_v2.diagnosis: The corrected domain-naive H0 independently supplied and selected the same canonical public-parameterized repair on all six cases, so the reference skill had no remaining paired outcome advantage.

next_experiment: Run 3 starts from clean H0 and lets the slow Agent address remaining naturally mined failure patterns, with impulsive-outlier expected to be the primary unsaturated repairable family.
